IMPLEMENT.tasks_summary: 42/43 complete (5.5 optional smoke test deferred per task description)
deviations_for_impl_review: Langfuse v3 SDK API drift: start_as_current_observation(as_type=...) replaces trace()/generation() — design.md predates v3, implementation matches v3
auth_check() unavailable in Langfuse v3 docs; auth-failure detection moved to factory level-3 degradation (catch on construction or first emission)
wrap_extension_tool / wrap_http_tool accept Any with passthrough for non-StructuredTool inputs (kept tests with MagicMock tools green; spec language targets StructuredTool specifically)
PEP 695 generic syntax (def traced_harness[R]) instead of TypeVar — Python 3.12 idiom, satisfies ruff UP047
set_assistant_ctx invoked in BOTH `run` and `export` CLI commands so export path is also tagged
Langfuse-worker compose service intentionally lacks LANGFUSE_INIT_* (only web service performs headless init in v3 self-hosting)

CORRECTED 2026-04-25 (Iter 1) — trace_delegation.task IS sanitized at emission via langfuse.py:155 (`input={"task": sanitize(task)}`); the original deviation note overstated the privacy risk. Secret-format substrings ARE scrubbed even for ≤256-char tasks. Residual concern is non-secret-format PII (free-form prose containing names) which the regex chain does not catch — that is a spec-level question about what counts as 'sensitive content' and belongs in a separate proposal if treated as in-scope.
IMPLEMENT.change_context_status: all_phases_complete (RTM 18/18 with Files Changed populated; Coverage Summary at 18/18 traced)

IMPL_ITERATE.termination_reason: convergence — all remaining findings below medium threshold after iter 1

fixed.summary: List elements under SAFE_FIELDS keys bypassed the redaction chain because parent-key safety propagated to per-element calls. Fix: force_sanitize=True on list descent. Spec scenario added to Secret Sanitization Requirement. 4 regression tests added.

deferred_to_impl_review: Empty-credential warning emitted at config.from_env rather than via factory._warn_once dedup mechanism (architectural coherence concern; spec-compliant as-is)
Module-level __getattr__ at langfuse.py:262 raises AttributeError which is the default behavior — pointless dead code, cleanup candidate
Validator asymmetry: noop.trace_tool_call quietly returns on missing tool_kind; langfuse.trace_tool_call raises (Protocol type hints make this near-impossible in practice)
docs/observability.md Stop-hook section lacks intro context
out_of_scope_followup: tests/http_tools/ — 11 pytest failures (FileNotFoundError) referencing the unarchived openspec/changes/http-tools-layer/contracts/fixtures/ path. Verified via baseline reproduction at a079754 to predate this iteration. Right fix is to relocate fixtures into tests/http_tools/fixtures/. File as gh issue with label followup + openspec:http-tools-layer post-merge.
IMPL_ITERATE.deviation_7_corrected: trace_delegation.task IS sanitized at emission via langfuse.py:155; original IMPLEMENT-phase deviation note overstated privacy risk and has been corrected in deviations_for_impl_review[6] above
